Pheebs: So Rach.
Rach: Yeah.
Pheebs: Where is Emma?
Rach: Oh, Monica made me send her to my mother's. Apparently babies and weddings don't mix.
Speaker 3: Are you still crying about your damn baby? Pheebs, you gotta keep the line moving, remember, 20 seconds per person. Your see these clowns all the time!
Speaker 4: Hey, you're Mike's parents, right?
Speaker 5: Yes, we are.
Speaker 4: Ah, our little ones are growing up fast, uh?
buddy: How's that?
Speaker 4: You know, on the one hand you're happy for them, but on the other hand it's hard to let go.
buddy: Who in God's name are you?
Speaker 4: Hey, I'm not that fond of you either, ok buddy? But I'm just trying to be nice for the kids!
